title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 17 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 17 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 17 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/07/2024
DCE iron ore futures cotinued in the morning,v and droped in the afternoon. an decrease of 2.66%throughout the day; Some traders are unable to sell their products due to market closures. Some steel mills purchased on demand, and the purchasing enthusiasm has slightly increased .
